notes: Create these in Settings → Tags. Tag names are lowercase with colon separators — match exactly, GHL tags are case-sensitive in workflows.

tags.name: buyer:new
tags.purpose: Triggers intake workflow. Applied on form submit or manual add.

tags.name: buyer:active
tags.purpose: Live in the matching pool. n8n ONLY pulls contacts with this tag.

tags.name: buyer:cold
tags.purpose: No response by day 14 of intake sequence. Removed from active sends.

tags.name: buyer:dormant
tags.purpose: Hit 90-day rule without touch. Flagged for quarterly re-verify.

tags.name: buyer:vip
tags.purpose: Closed at least one deal. Permanent status — never auto-removed.

tags.name: engage:a-tier
tags.purpose: Scoring passed all 3 criteria. Controls deal send priority.

tags.name: deal:new-inventory
tags.purpose: Applied by n8n on each matched contact. Fires Workflow 2.

rules: Only one tier tag at a time. When upgrading (B→A), remove old tier tag in the SAME workflow step before applying new one.
buyer:active is the gate — n8n ignores anything without it.
buyer:vip stacks with tier tags. A VIP can also be engage:a-tier.
deal:new-inventory MUST be removed at end of Workflow 2 to prevent re-fire.
